title: Spawn Egg Information
description: Display the mob information of the spawn egg.
body:
This mod can view the mob information of the spawn egg faster and better, including the
- The image of Mob itself
- Max Health
- Speed
- Attack Damage
- Armor
- Mob Follow Range
- Knockback Resistance
- Attack Knockback
- Mob Type

![In-game display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65a5b9e9f7651811015687c38310351f2ac22e96.png)

![In-game display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/331abd17d52361fd05f9d871f6dc0b98dd8fc53e.png)
